subcodes.first_line: O Manifestation of Generosity! Hearken unto that which the Pen, encompassed by sorrows from the hosts of Satan, revealeth unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مظهر الجود ان استمع ما یلقیک قلم الذی احاطته الاحزان من جنود الشیطان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God
